CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

Build and Preview Commands

quarto render          # Build the entire site to _site/
quarto preview         # Serve site locally with live reload
quarto render about.qmd  # Render a single page

Architecture

This is a Quarto static website — an academic personal site for Dr. Kirshanthan Sundararajah (Virginia Tech CS). No Node.js, no backend.

Source files (.qmd = Quarto Markdown with YAML front matter): - index.qmd (homepage/about), publications.qmd, teaching.qmd, service.qmd, awards.qmd — top-level pages - publications/ — one .qmd per paper; Quarto’s listing feature auto-aggregates these into publications.qmd

Output: _site/ (generated, do not edit directly)

Configuration: _quarto.yml controls site layout, navbar, theme (cyborg), colors (#630031 background, #CF4420 accent), and body width (1000px).

Adding a Publication

Create a new .qmd file in publications/ following existing convention (e.g., 2026confname.qmd). Required front matter fields used by the listing:

---
title: "Paper Title"
author: "Author One, Author Two"
date: "YYYY-MM-DD"
categories: [Conference]
description: "Venue name and year"
---

The body typically contains an abstract and a links section with buttons to PDF, slides, etc.
